calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-05-2009 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-21-2009 Continued To Oct-05-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann specially appearing for Kelly Dixon for Linda Harrington.

The Court stated that there was a money judgment and costs in favor of the Ross estate and that there were no details on the costs. Mr. Vann stated that he would file a document showing the itemized costs. The matter was continued to October 5, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Sep-02-2009 Continued To Sep-21-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or Another Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-29-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or Another Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-08-2009 Continued To Jun-29-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amy Harrington appeared on behalf of Linda Harrington.

No appearance was made by Counsel Kelly Dearman. Ms. Harrington stated the funds owed to the estate had been paid out. An Order to Show Cause will be issued to the Attorney Kelly Dearman for failure to appear and for failure to file the Petition For Final Distribution or a status report. The return date is June 29, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. This matter was also continued to June 29, 2009.

Judge: Ronald Quidachay. Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR#5220. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Sum.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Jun-08-2009 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or Another Status Report
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Continued To Jun-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kelly Dearman for Linda Harrington (Petitioner).

Ms. Dearman stated that the matter is still on appeal and is currently briefing. The matter was continued to June 8, 2009 for status on the appeal. The Court requested Ms. Dearman file a written status report two weeks prior to the next hearing and submit an order continuing today's status for an additional six months.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Arlene Howell, CSR#2542. Clerk: J. Alameda./R. Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status
Off Calendar Dec-08-2008 Continued To Jun-08-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Third Status Report And Petition For Continiation Of Estate Administration
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Third Status Report And Petition For Continiation Of Estate Administration
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Continued To Aug-12-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or Another Status Report
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Continued To Dec-08-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kelly Dearman for Linda Harrington (Administrator).

Ms. Dearman stated that they were not ready for the final distribution, that she would be filing the status report, that the Quiet Title action was on appeal and requested a 6 month continuance. The matter was continued to December 08, 2008 for status or for filing of the Petition For Final Distribution.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lazatin.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of Either A Petition For Final Distribution Or Another Status Report

Ststus Report And Petition For Continuation Of Estate Administration.
Off Calendar Apr-17-2007 Granted Per Written Order

For Authority To Retain Attorney For Civil Litigation
Off Calendar Oct-06-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Kelly Dearman appearing for administrator Linda Harrington. Gerardo Sandoval is also in court. Settlement fell through. Case will go to trial on Tuesday. Mr. Sandoval stated his qualifications to try the case. The contingency fee agreement issue addressed. Mr. Sandoval agrees to talk to Mr. Vann if Mr. Vann is asking for fees. Matter granted. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
